title: Integrate RAK2287 LoRa HAT driver in mesh-gateway
description: Add support for RAK2287 (SX1302 based) SPI interface in rust/mesh-gateway for Linux border router. Include packet forwarder or direct LoRa PHY integration with the existing lora-phy abstraction. Test with real HAT on RPi.
close_reason: Broken into sub-issues afbk.1.1-5 for parallel implementation
